verses.text: The garments of service and the ephod are made of gold and fine linen. The ephod. The priest's robe is wrought.
The garments of service and the ephod are made of gold and fine linen. The ephod. The priest's robe is wrought.
The garments of service and the ephod are made of gold and fine linen. The ephod. The priest's robe is wrought.
The garments of service and the ephod are made of gold and fine linen. The ephod. The priest's robe is wrought.
The garments of service and the ephod are made of gold and fine linen. The ephod. The priest's robe is wrought.
The onyx stones with Israel's names are set on the shoulders. The stones. The people are borne before God.
The onyx stones with Israel's names are set on the shoulders. The stones. The people are borne before God.
The breastplate is made, set with the first rows of precious stones. The breastplate. The tribes are set on the priest's heart.
The breastplate is made, set with the first rows of precious stones. The breastplate. The tribes are set on the priest's heart.
The breastplate is made, set with the first rows of precious stones. The breastplate. The tribes are set on the priest's heart.
The breastplate is made, set with the first rows of precious stones. The breastplate. The tribes are set on the priest's heart.
Twelve stones, each engraved with a tribe's name, complete it. Twelve names. Each tribe has its place.
Twelve stones, each engraved with a tribe's name, complete it. Twelve names. Each tribe has its place.
Twelve stones, each engraved with a tribe's name, complete it. Twelve names. Each tribe has its place.
Chains of wreathen gold fasten the breastplate to the ephod. Joined. The breastplate is attached.
Chains of wreathen gold fasten the breastplate to the ephod. Joined. The breastplate is attached.
Chains of wreathen gold fasten the breastplate to the ephod. Joined. The breastplate is attached.
Chains of wreathen gold fasten the breastplate to the ephod. Joined. The breastplate is attached.
Rings and a lace of blue bind it fast, as commanded. Secured. It rests close upon the ephod.
Rings and a lace of blue bind it fast, as commanded. Secured. It rests close upon the ephod.
Rings and a lace of blue bind it fast, as commanded. Secured. It rests close upon the ephod.
The robe of blue with bells and pomegranates is made. The robe. His ministry is heard.
The robe of blue with bells and pomegranates is made. The robe. His ministry is heard.
The robe of blue with bells and pomegranates is made. The robe. His ministry is heard.
The robe of blue with bells and pomegranates is made. The robe. His ministry is heard.
The robe of blue with bells and pomegranates is made. The robe. His ministry is heard.
Coats, mitre, and linen breeches are made for the priests. Clothed. The priests are arrayed.
Coats, mitre, and linen breeches are made for the priests. Clothed. The priests are arrayed.
Coats, mitre, and linen breeches are made for the priests. Clothed. The priests are arrayed.
The golden plate, 'HOLINESS TO THE LORD,' is made for the mitre. Holiness. The crown of the priesthood.
The golden plate, 'HOLINESS TO THE LORD,' is made for the mitre. Holiness. The crown of the priesthood.
All the work of the tabernacle is finished, as the LORD commanded. Finished. Obedience completes the work.
They bring the tent, the ark, the table, and the candlestick to Moses. Brought. The finished work is presented.
They bring the tent, the ark, the table, and the candlestick to Moses. Brought. The finished work is presented.
They bring the tent, the ark, the table, and the candlestick to Moses. Brought. The finished work is presented.
They bring the tent, the ark, the table, and the candlestick to Moses. Brought. The finished work is presented.
They bring the tent, the ark, the table, and the candlestick to Moses. Brought. The finished work is presented.
They bring the altars, the hangings, and the holy garments. All brought. Nothing is left undone.
They bring the altars, the hangings, and the holy garments. All brought. Nothing is left undone.
They bring the altars, the hangings, and the holy garments. All brought. Nothing is left undone.
They bring the altars, the hangings, and the holy garments. All brought. Nothing is left undone.
Moses sees they have done all as commanded, and blesses them. Blessed. Faithful work earns approval.
Moses sees they have done all as commanded, and blesses them. Blessed. Faithful work earns approval.
